song.title: Enraptured in Your Love
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Enraptured in Your love— how fresh and new! Infuse me with Your love— Sweeter, fresher than dew! Your love (embrace me close) Does forward guide; I revel in Your love, on Your breast abide.|| How I yearn, O Lord, to delight in love, By Your love o’ershadow me. A banner over me: Your love— Yourself, For Your love and Yourself are one.
[V2] 2) You are my dearest One, My only Love. Yes, Lord, now You alone Are the object of love. If You redemption give and only love, I know my heart won’t be fully satisfied.|| How I yearn, dear Lord, Your own self to gain, For I know it’s only You. It’s You that I pursue, And You are love; My sole Treasure You are to me.
song.author: Titus Chu
